JHIN-BULLET_POWER.title: Bullets
JHIN-MARK_POWER.title: Mark
JHIN-MARK_POWER.description: The next time Jhin hits this enemy with a [gold]Shoot[/gold] card, it takes {markDamagePerStack} additional damage per stack, then loses all [gold]Mark[/gold].
JHIN-LOTUS_TRAP_POWER.title: Lotus Trap
JHIN-LOTUS_TRAP_POWER.description: After this enemy attacks, remove [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold]. Deal {lotusTrapDamagePerStack} damage and apply {lotusTrapWeakPerStack} [gold]Weak[/gold] per stack. If this damage kills the enemy, deal {lotusTrapDeathExplosionDamage} damage to all enemies per stack.
